objective: Shift routing governance from breadth-biased assumptions to tier-aware, narrow default-core enforcement.

policyDecisionsImplemented.defaultCoreSelection: Built-in routing evaluator fixtures now require default-tier top-skill selection.
policyDecisionsImplemented.untieredAssets: On-disk skills missing explicit tier assignment now fail consistency/coverage governance.
policyDecisionsImplemented.breadthAssumptionRemoved: Coverage no longer requires all on-disk skills to show implied dynamic selection evidence. Only default-tier skills are required.
policyDecisionsImplemented.manualDormantLeakageGuard: Default-core evaluator run fails if built-in default fixtures route to manual/dormant/candidate-prune/untiered skills.

changes: Added tier-evidence loading and validation for required 4-tier model.
Added on-disk tier assignment enforcement (untiered skill = failure).
Added default-tier enabled-state enforcement and enabled-but-untiered failure checks.
Coverage scope narrowed to default-tier skills only.
Added tier evidence parsing via --tier-evidence option.
Added untiered on-disk detection and strict failure behavior.
Added alias-aware tier resolution for superpowers/* disk paths.
Extended report with checkedTier, totalSkillsOnDisk, untiered, and non-default counts.
Replaced broad default fixtures with narrow default-core fixture set.
Added tier evidence loading and default-core leakage breach checks.
Added fixture validation for optional enforceDefaultCore boolean.
Added report section for default-core enforcement and leakage breaches.
Updated gate descriptions to reflect tier-aware governance.
Wired --tier-evidence argument into evaluator and coverage gates.
Redesigned test from all-skills implied matrix to default-core implied matrix.
Updated fixtures for tier-aware coverage analysis.
